{{Event Header|StS2 Sunken Treasury.png}} {{E|Sunken Treasury|2}} is an {{2|Events|Event}} found exclusively in the {{2|Underdocks}}. == Options == {{Frame|First Chest}} {{TS|positive||Gain 52-68 Gold.}}
{{Frame|Second Chest}} {{TS|positive||Gain 303-363 Gold.}} {{TS|negative||Add {{C|Greed||2}} (curse) to Deck.}} == Dialogue ==
A path leads you into a partially submerged vault. There are {{TS|blue||2}} {{TS|gold||chests}} but only {{TS|blue||1}} {{TS|purple|shake|brittle key}}. {{TS|gold||The First Chest:}} Shaking it, you get jingly-jangly noises. Bit of gold. {{TS|gold||The Second Chest:}} Enormous, ornate, and clearly {{TS|red||cursed}}. Lots of gold!
{{Frame|First Chest}}
Yup, there was {{TS|gold||gold}} in it.
{{Frame|Second Chest}}
You've never seen so much gold in one place! All of the Merchant's wares can be bought...You cannot buy everything with only 360 gold. Dangerous thugs can be paid off... The feverishly greedy thoughts stay with you forever...
